/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Creature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/NeuralNetwork.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/State.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/StateStack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Label.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/Slider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/MenuState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/TerrainEditorState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/CreatureEditorState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/GamingState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/NNConfigState.cpp.o -o bin/main  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a /usr/lib/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/libXrender.so /usr/lib/libXfixes.so /usr/lib/libXi.so /usr/lib/libXext.so /usr/lib/libX11.so _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a -lrt /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libudev.so -ldl /usr/lib/libfreetype.so
